findings.title: Slab allocator UAF path identified but fake object placement unvalidated
findings.statement: Decompilation reveals the slab allocator metadata layout and a UAF in the message handler free path. The free-list corruption allows controlled re-allocation, but validating fake object placement and vtable hijack requires dynamic heap state inspection that the current tooling cannot provide.

evidence.summary: Ghidra decompilation confirms slab metadata layout and UAF path; gdb batch confirms free-list corruption reachable but cannot inspect runtime heap state
